form.formComment: Last start failed to finish when he ran at this track on April 4 over 2230m. Before that, and went on to finish a respectable sixth over 2230m at this track last start. Chance with manners.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start failed to finish when he ran at this track on April 4 over 2230m. Before that, and went on to finish a respectable sixth over 2230m at this track last start. Chance with manners.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait free of interference shortly after the start was effected.
Broke gait shortly after the start was effected.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 6th (Fr5) over 2230m at this track, beaten 70 m by Sister Patrick (2:51.70) in 3 LIFETIME WINS on April 4 at $27.60. Before that was well beaten after breaking at this track on March 23. Others appear better placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked behind the tiring Billysophia between the 750m and the 450m.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (20m Fr2) over 2230m at this track, beaten 8 m by Nothing I Want (2:59.80) in 5 LIFETIME WINS on March 28 at $15. Two runs back 2nd (Sr1) over 1800m at this track was 3rd-6.8 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Lickadee Split (2:17.50) in No NR on March 23 at $26. First four hope.

form.formComment: Solid run when beaten by 2.5 m finishing second behind Sister Patrick at this track over 2230m in a 3 LIFETIME WINS on April 4 at $8.20. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after showing early speed, behind Hayoak at this track over 2230m in a NR up to 51 on April 11 at $10. Won the last time he attempted a standing start.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped near the 450m. Checked, leaving the back straight final occasion.
Shifted out under pressure and raced roughly in the final straight.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Sr2) over 2230m at this track, beaten 45 m by Hayoak (2:50.80) in NR up to 51 on April 11 at $51.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 10th (Sr2) over 2230m at this track, beaten 45 m by Hayoak (2:50.80) in NR up to 51 on April 11 at $51.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced by Outside Wire near the 1900m and again near the 1600m.
Tightened and broke gait racing towards the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start a big 3 m win (20m Fr3) at this track (2:59.80) beating En Masse in 5 LIFETIME WINS on March 28 at $3.40. Can win again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait free of interference near the 400m.

form.formComment: Galloped out and took no competitive part last start 8th (FT Fr4) over 2230m at this track, well beaten by Majestic Summer (2:55.40) in NR up to 46 on March 28 at $7. The run before was well beaten after breaking at this track on March 11. Strong claims if he gets it right.
